titleStmt.title: SII 22.431: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 431. (A.R. No. 431 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, SRIVAIKUNTHAM TALUK, MURAPPANĀḌU. VĒDANĀRĀYAṆA PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE TRIBH. KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ—11th + 1st YEAR

summary.p: This is an incomplete inscription which might be ascribed to Māṟavarmaṉ Sundara-Pāṇḍya II. It states that at the request of minister Maḻavarāyaṉ, the king granted the taxes due to him on (3/4) vēli and one mā and half of land at Māṇikuḍi, a hamlet of Śrīvallabhamaṅgalam in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam, which was in the enjoyment of a certain Āli Villavadaraiyaṉ of Vaḻugūr, to the temple of Sōmidēva-viṇṇagar-āḻvār at Sōmidēva-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Murappu-nāḍu for the requirements of worship to the deity. The consolidated dues payable on the land both for the kār and paśānam crops are given as [2] kalam, 1 tūṇi and 1 padakku of paddy on every mā of land (wet) and 2 diramam on every mā of (dry) land growing sesamum, millet, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
2 svastiśrīḥ tribhuvanacakravartti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ murappu nāṭṭu brahmadeyam somidevaccaturvedimaṅkalattu somidevaviṇṇakarāḻvār kOyil nampuceyvāṉukkum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum Ivvāḻvāṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku vaḻukū
ruṭaiyāṉ Ālivillavataraiyaṟku kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu śrīvallabhamaṅkalattu māṇikuṭiyil kāṇiyāṉa nilam mukkāle yorumāvaraiyum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum meppe
yarpaṭṭaṉavumuṭpaṭa patiṉoṉṟāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Iṟuppatāka Iṭappeṟa veṇumeṉṟum Innilam Iṟukku miṭattu nilam mukkāle yoru māvum nilamaḷantu payirpāṟttu viḷainta nilattukku kaṭamaiyum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum kāri
yavārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟum poṉvari yum maṟṟu meppeyarpaṭṭaṉavu muṭpaṭa Ivvūr tarappaṭi kārukku māttāl nellu kalaṉe tūṇippatakkākavum Eḷ varaku tiṉai viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭā
kavum pacāṉamum Ivvaricai yiṟuppatākavum Iṟai kaṭṭaveṇumeṉṟum Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvāḻvāṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku vaḻukūruṭaiyāṉ Āli villavataraiyaṉukku kiḻkaḷa
kkūṟṟattu śrīvallabhamaṅkalattu maṇaṟkuṭiyil kāṇiyāṉa nilam mukkāle Orumāvum kaṭamaiyum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum veṭṭi pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟu meppeyarpa (īncomplete)
Digital edition of SII 22.431 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
